Unplanned (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,005,109Details
International Box Office $2,408,494
Worldwide Box Office $21,413,603
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,859,957
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,430,889
Total $3,290,846
Further financial details...

Synopsis

As one of the youngest Planned Parenthood clinic directors in the nation, Abby Johnson was involved in upwards of 22,000 abortions and counseled countless women on their reproductive choices. Her passion surrounding a woman’s right to choose led her to become a spokesperson for Planned Parenthood, fighting to enact legislation for the cause she so deeply believed in. Until the day she saw something that changed everything.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,382,298 (33.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.98 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:88.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$6,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,059 opening theaters/1,516 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $24,814,536

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 29th, 2019 (Wide) by SDG Releasing
International Releases: October 4th, 2019 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 25th, 2019 (Wide), released as Inesperado (Mexico)
November 1st, 2019 (Wide) (Poland)
July 3rd, 2020 (Wide) (Spain)
October 9th, 2020 (Wide) (Brazil)
Video Release: August 13th, 2019 by Mill Creek Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for some disturbing/bloody images.
(Rating bulletin 2566 (Cert #52060), 2/20/2019)
Running Time: 110 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Agitprop
Plot point: Abortion, Biography, Christians
Subgenre: Faith-Based Drama
Target audience: Faith-Based Film
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Soli Deo Gloria Releasing
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

As one of the youngest Planned Parenthood clinic directors in the nation, Abby Johnson was involved in upwards of 22,000 abortions and counseled countless women on their reproductive choices. Her passion surrounding a woman’s right to choose led her to become a spokesperson for Planned Parenthood, fighting to enact legislation for the cause she so deeply believed in. Until the day she saw something that changed everything.
